title: Lucario Overhaul UNOFFICIAL PORT for Cobblemon 1.7
description: This datapack/resourcepack combo aims to make the "Lucario Overhaul" compatible for Cobblemon 1.7 until the original author updates it.
body:
# [**ALL CREDIT GOES TO JOESEFF!!**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/lucario-overhaul)

This datapack was made because the original Lucario Overhaul never got updated to Cobblemon 1.7; Cobbleverse was able to add 1.7 support.

**Why didn't this datapack? I didn't like any of the answers I could have gotten.**

So, I decided to solve that problem. All (except Mega Lucario) of the cosmetic items that were from the original datapack/resourcepack made it into this modpack.

**Why didn't you add Mega Lucario?** Because *[Mega Showdown](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-mega-showdown) already added Mega Lucario*, and on top of that, [Nava's Z-A Megas](https://modrinth.com/datapack/navas-zamega) implemented Mega Lucario Z...which I think is really cool

Place this zip file in both your **resourcepack** folder and your **datapack** folder, and it should work!

In game: Shift + Right Click in front of your Lucario with a compatible cosmetic item, go to the upper right hand side ("Change cosmetic item" or similar), and click on that item. Your Lucario should now have changed appearance!
